case_title: DIANA TISHKOVSKAYA VS. ARTCORE CONSTRUCTION INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-11-2008 - CONTINUED TO MAY-23-2008 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PARTIES ARE PRESENT, HOWEVER THE DEFENDANT DOES NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM HEARING THE CASE. CONTINUED FOR COMMISSIONER SLAVIT TO HEAR CASE. JUDGE PRO TEM: EDWARD HOLTZ. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TISHKOVSKAYA, DIANA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARTCORE CONSTRUCTION INC. $1,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,475.00, IF DEFENDANT'S PREVIOUSLY TENDERED CHECK FOR $375.00 IS STILL NEGOTIABLE, IT MAY BE USED AS A CREDIT AGAINST THIS JUDGMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
